data: {"generalSituation":"With the anticyclone aloft over the northern part of the South China Sea strengthening gradually, the weather will be mainly fine over the coast of southern China in the next couple of days. A band of clouds will affect the coast of Guangdong on Thursday. Winds are expected to be weak over Guangdong in the latter part of this week. It will be hot during the day. Under the influence of a trough of low pressure, there will be a few showers over southern China early next week.","weatherForecast":[{"forecastDate":"20260323","week":"Monday","forecastWind":"East force 2 to 3.","forecastWeather":"Mainly fine.","forecastMaxtemp":{"value":27,"unit":"C"},"forecastMintemp":{"value":21,"unit":"C"},"forecastMaxrh":{"value":90,"unit":"percent"},"forecastMinrh":{"value":65,"unit":"percent"},"ForecastIcon":50,"PSR":"Low"},{"forecastDate":"20260324","week":"Tuesday","forecastWind":"East force 3 to 4.","forecastWeather":"Sunny periods.","forecastMaxtemp":{"value":27,"unit":"C"},"forecastMintemp":{"value":22,"unit":"C"},"forecastMaxrh":{"value":90,"unit":"percent"},"forecastMinrh":{"value":65,"unit":"percent"},"ForecastIcon":51,"PSR":"Low"},{"forecastDate":"20260325","week":"Wednesday","forecastWind":"Light winds force 2.","forecastWeather":"Cloudy periods in the morning and at night.
